title: Subtask 1
description: Verify repository status with git status to identify changes

title: Subtask 2
description: Stage specific files or all changes using git add <file> or git add .

title: Subtask 3
description: Review staged changes with git diff --staged to confirm correctness

title: Subtask 4
description: Craft a clear, concise commit message describing the changes

title: Subtask 5
description: Create the commit with git commit -m "Your descriptive commit message"

title: Subtask 6
description: Optionally amend the last commit if needed using git commit --amend

title: Subtask 7
description: Push the commit to the remote branch with git push (specify remote/branch if required)

title: Subtask 8
description: Confirm the commit on the remote or CI status as applicable
